description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a bold, angular design with a predominantly red and black color scheme. The side panels are adorned with striking graphics, including a menacing robotic or alien face and stylized text reading 'SPECTRUM' and 'MUSTDEED' along with triangular motifs. The front of the cabinet houses a classic control panel with a red joystick and four colored buttons, set below a display screen framed by a red marquee. The lower front section includes a coin slot and a recessed area for coin collection. The cabinet's surface appears to be made of painted wood or laminate, with a glossy finish that highlights the vivid artwork. The overall aesthetic is aggressive and futuristic, making it a visually captivating centerpiece for any urban entertainment space.
description: A red and black arcade game cabinet with bold side graphics, a joystick and buttons, and a prominent display screen. The design features futuristic artwork and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the 'MUSTDEED' text, triangular motifs, and a large robotic face graphic, with the control panel and joystick partially visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the full robotic face artwork, the coin slot at the bottom, and the angular shape of the cabinet.
description_view_2: Right side view displaying the 'SPECTRUM' text, triangular motifs, and the continuation of the robotic face graphic, with the control panel and joystick partially visible.
description_view_3: Front view showing the display screen, red marquee with 'SPECTRUM' text, control panel with joystick and four colored buttons, and the coin slot below.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, curved, medium size with a visible bezel
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one red joystick and four colored buttons arranged in a diamond pattern; control panel is red with black trim and colored button accents.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; red marquee with black 'SPECTRUM' text and triangular motifs, matching the aggressive, futuristic theme of the side panel graphics.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels feature bold red and black artwork with a large robotic or alien face, stylized text ('SPECTRUM' and 'MUSTDEED'), and triangular motifs, creating a dramatic and futuristic visual theme.
